myth_text_en: Vaccines cause infertility in women.
correct_text_en: Vaccines are rigorously tested and do not affect fertility.
correct_text_lg: Enkingo tezikosa kubeera n'abaana.

myth_text_en: Vaccines contain microchips.
correct_text_en: Vaccines contain no microchips.
correct_text_lg: Enkingo tezirimu chip.

myth_text_en: The yellow fever vaccine makes you sterile.
correct_text_en: Fact: The yellow fever vaccine is safe and required for international travel. It does not affect fertility.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Olukingo lwa Yellow Fever lukuuma era teluleeta bugumba.

myth_text_en: Vaccines make children weak.
correct_text_en: Fact: Vaccines prevent paralysis and life-threatening diseases. They build the immune system.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Enkingo ziyiza obulwadde era tezireeta bunaafu.

myth_text_en: HIV is caused by witchcraft.
correct_text_en: HIV is caused by a virus transmitted through fluids. It is managed by ART.
correct_text_lg: HIV ereetera omukutu gwa HIV, si obulogo. Eddagala lya ART liyamba.

myth_text_en: Mosquitoes can spread HIV.
correct_text_en: Fact: HIV cannot live inside mosquitoes; they cannot transmit the virus to humans.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Ensiri tezikwata kawuka ka HIV.

myth_text_en: Herbs cure malaria.
correct_text_en: Malaria requires approved medicines like ACTs. Herbs may soothe symptoms but don't kill the parasite.
correct_text_lg: Ebimera bisobola okuyamba, naye tebikomya akawuka. Wetaagibwa eddagala ddongo.

myth_text_en: Eating sugarcane or too much sun causes malaria.
correct_text_en: Fact: Malaria is only caused by the bite of an infected female Anopheles mosquito.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okulya ebikajjo oba omusana tekuleta malaria. Malaria ereetebwa nsiri.

myth_text_en: Infant fever and diarrhea are caused by 'ebinyo' (teething).
correct_text_en: Fact: Fever is often a sign of malaria or infection. Tooth extraction (ebinyo) is dangerous and unnecessary.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Omuyini mu baana munnana guba bubonero bwa malaria, ssi 'ebinyo'.

myth_text_en: Hospital delivery is dangerous.
correct_text_en: Skilled health facility deliveries are safer and prevent maternal death.
correct_text_lg: Okuzaala mu ddwaliro kusinga okukuuma omukazi n'omwana.

myth_text_en: Iron tablets make the baby too big for delivery.
correct_text_en: Fact: Iron prevents anemia in the mother and supports healthy baby development. It doesn't make babies oversized.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Ebiweke by'ekyuma (iron) biyanba omukazi okuba n'omusaayi omumala.

myth_text_en: Ultrasound scans cause baby blindness.
correct_text_en: Fact: Ultrasound uses safe sound waves, not radiation. It is safe for the baby's eyes and development.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okukebera n'ekyuma (ultrasound) telumya mwana mu lubuto.

myth_text_en: Drinking hot water kills COVID-19.
correct_text_en: High temperatures don't kill the virus inside the body and can cause burns.
correct_text_lg: Okunywa ebyokulya ebyokya tekutuuka mu mawuggwe gye kawangaalira.

myth_text_en: Ginger and lemon is a cure for COVID-19.
correct_text_en: Fact: While they support the immune system, they do not kill the virus or cure the disease.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Tangawuzi n'ennimu biyanba emibiri naye tebiwonya COVID.

myth_text_en: Steaming (Kufumbira) kills the COVID-19 virus.
correct_text_en: Fact: Steaming can soothe symptoms like a blocked nose but it does not kill the virus and can cause severe burns.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okufumbira kiyinza okuyamba naye tekitta kawuka ka COVID.

myth_text_en: Eating mangoes causes malaria.
correct_text_en: Malaria is caused by mosquito bites, not fruit.
correct_text_lg: Okulya emmiyembe tekuleta malaria.

myth_text_en: Eating more salt makes you stronger.
correct_text_en: Fact: Excess salt leads to high blood pressure (hypertension) and kidney issues, not physical strength.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Munnyo mungi aleeta puleesa, ssi maanyi.

myth_text_en: Children shouldn't eat eggs until they walk.
correct_text_en: Fact: Eggs are an excellent source of protein and support healthy growth from 6 months of age.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Abaana basaanidde okulya amaggi okusobola okukula obulungi.

myth_text_en: Ebola is a curse from spirits.
correct_text_en: Ebola is a viral disease spread by contact with body fluids. It is not spiritual.
correct_text_lg: Ebola esaasaanyizibwa mu kukwata ku mazzi g'omubiri, si mu mpewo.

myth_text_en: Clear water is always safe to drink.
correct_text_en: Fact: Water that looks clear can still contain invisible germs. All drinking water should be boiled.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Amazzi gajonjo gasobola okubaamu obuwuka; gasaanidde kufumbibwa.

myth_text_en: Water alone is enough to clean hands.
correct_text_en: Fact: You must use soap to break down oils and kill germs effectively.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Amazzi gokka tegawonya buwuka; sabuni yetaagibwa.

myth_text_en: Syphilis can be cured with lemon juice.
correct_text_en: Syphilis requires antibiotic treatment from a health facility. Lemon juice is ineffective.
correct_text_lg: Syphilis ewoneka n'eddagala ery'ekikugu okuva mu ddwaliro.

myth_text_en: You can tell if someone has an STD just by looking at them.
correct_text_en: Fact: Many STDs have no visible symptoms for a long time. Only a medical test can confirm infection.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Endwadde z'ekikaba nnyingi teziraako bubonero bwangu kulaba.

myth_text_en: Strong alcohol cures Gonorrhea.
correct_text_en: Fact: Alcohol has no effect on bacteria; only medical antibiotics prescribed by a doctor can cure it.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Omwenge tegulwaanya nziku (Gonorrhea). Wetaagibwa eddagala.

myth_text_en: Cervical cancer is caused by witchcraft.
correct_text_en: Fact: Most cervical cancer is caused by HPV infection. It can be prevented by the HPV vaccine.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Kkookolo w'ennabaana aveera mu kawuka ka HPV, ssi bulogo.
